heading: Comprehensive economic and infrastructure development plans
label: 15502 Comprehensive economic and infrastructure development plans
notes: Codificationand enacted identical sections. was repealed by .Pub. L. 110–234Pub. L. 110–246Pub. L. 110–234section 4(a) of Pub. L. 110–246
Effective DateSection effective on the first day of the first fiscal year beginning after , see , set out as a note under .June 18, 2008section 14217(d) of Pub. L. 110–246section 15101 of this title

children.heading: .—State Plans
children.label: a .—State Plans
children.text: In accordance with policies established by a Commission, each State member of the Commission shall submit a comprehensive economic and infrastructure development plan for the area of the region represented by the State member.

children.heading: .—Content of Plan
children.label: b .—Content of Plan
children.text: A State economic and infrastructure development plan shall reflect the goals, objectives, and priorities identified in any applicable economic and infrastructure development plan developed by a Commission under section 15303.
consult with local development districts, local units of government, and local colleges and universities; and
take into consideration the goals, objectives, priorities, and recommendations of the entities described in paragraph (1).

children.heading: .—In general
children.label: 1 .—In general
children.text: A Commission and applicable State and local development districts shall encourage and assist, to the maximum extent practicable, public participation in the development, revision, and implementation of all plans and programs under this subtitle.

children.heading: .—Guidelines
children.label: 2 .—Guidelines
children.text: A Commission shall develop guidelines for providing public participation, including public hearings.
